LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JULY 30, 2013 TO ALLOW MOVING PARTY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6C. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN JULY 10, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: JACQUELINE ALAMEDA, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, JUDGE MILLER DISCLOSES THAT SHE KNOWS AND IS SOCIAL FRIENDS WITH DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY ELIZABETH SALVESON. JUDGE MILLER PRACTICED LAW AT THE SAME LAW FIRM AS MS. SALVESON FROM DECEMBER 1981 TO MARCH 1987, AND FROM 1992-1995. THIS WILL NOT AFFECT HER ABILITY TO BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL IN THIS CASE, AND THAT SHE DOES NOT BELIEVE ANYONE AWARE OF THE FACTS WOULD BELIEVE THAT SHE COULD NOT BE FAIR AND IMPARTIAL. RULING: MATTER ARGUED. AT CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT ORDERS BOTH COUNSEL TO PREPARE/SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDERS BY END OF BUSINESS ON FRIDAY, AUGUST 2, 2013. THE COURT WILL TAKE DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT UNDER SUBMISSION WHEN PROPOSED ORDERS ARE RECEIVED BY THE COURT. JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, REPORTER: ANTHONY VAUGHN #6185.

Defendant City & County Of San Francisco'S Demurrer To 1st Amended Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. THE COURT HAS RECEIVED PROPOSED ORDERS SUBMITTED BY EACH PARTY AS REQUESTED BY THE COURT. Defendant City & County Of San Francisco'S Demurrer To 1st Amended ComplainT IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION BY THE COURT ON AUGUST 2, 2013. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Melanie Gheno CSR7489.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-30-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: DANIEL BERKO, ESQ., 415.771.6174, FOR PLAINTIFF LYNETTE BUTTRAM.
LARRY HECIMOVICH, DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, 415.554.3800, FOR DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

Judge Miller discloseS that she knows and is social friends with Deputy City Attorney Elizabeth Salveson. Judge Miller practiced law at the same law firm as Ms. Salveson from December 1981 to March 1987, and from 1992-1995. This will not affect her ability to be fair and impartial in this case, and that she does not believe anyone aware of the facts would believe that she could not be fair and impartial.

RULING: MATTER Argued. AT CONCLUSION OF ARGUMENT, THE COURT ORDERS BOTH COUNSEL TO PREPARE/SUBMIT PROPOSED ORDERS BY END OF BUSINESS ON FRIDAY, AUGUST 2, 2013. THE COURT WILL TAKE DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT UNDER SUBMISSION WHEN PROPOSED ORDERS ARE RECEIVED BY THE COURT. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Anthony Vaughn #6185.

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jul-10-2013 Continued To Jul-30-13 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is continued to July 30, 2013 to allow moving party to comply with Local Rule 2.6C. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the First Amended Complaint to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than July 10, 2013 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Not reported.

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-24-2013 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows:
DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is taken off calendar due to the filing of the First Amended Complaint. Judge Miller also disclosed that she knows and is social friends with Deputy City Attorney Elizabeth Salveson. Judge Miller practiced law at the same law firm as Ms. Salveson from Dec. 1981 to March 1987, and from 1992-1995. Judge Miller also disclosed that this will not affect her ability to be fair and impartial in this case. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C.
